title: Paper Electronics 2 - A Basic Stylophone
description: This ink is plating bath resistant and conductive to allow you to electroplate organic materials like cloth, leaves, wood, bone, etc. You can get it from me at https://sites.google.com/site/rmsgraphite/ and I am always happy to have an e-mail at robertmurraysmith64@gmail.com if you feel like dropping me a line. This is my second circuit and is a noise generator but it can be used as the basis for making a stylophone
